case_title: FAST MONEY, LLC. VS. CHRISTINE LARSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAST MONEY, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-30-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $170.00(PLAINTIFF'S COSTS) ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 26, 2012. DEFENDANT HAS TODAY PLAINTIFF $315.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $315.00 FILED BY FAST MONEY, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, CHRISTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -FEE FOR SERVICE $ 140.00 - SERVED SEP-12-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, CHRISTINE
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO CHRISTINE LARSON.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY FAST MONEY, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAST MONEY, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY KYLE CHUANG--MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO CHRISTINE LARSON.
